## Deployment Notes

The app runs on port 8080. Database config:

DATABASE_URL=postgres://deploy:Pr0dP@ssw0rd!@db.prod.example.com:5432/myapp
REDIS_URL=redis://default:r3d1sS3cr3t@redis.prod.example.com:6379/0

Local dev uses:
DATABASE_URL=postgres://dev:dev@localhost:5432/myapp_dev

The SSH key for deploy is:
-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
b3BlbnNzaC1rZXktdjEAAAAABG5vbmUAAAAEbm9uZQAAAAAAAAABAAAAMwAAAAtzc2gtZW
QyNTUxOQAAACBhYmNkZWZnaGlqa2xtbm9wcXJzdHV2d3h5ejAxMjM0NQAAAJhAAAABAAAA
-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----

Remember to rotate keys quarterly.
